creator: mp39590@gmail.com
text:
Attached patch do the following:
- update from ancient 20100131 snapshot to proper 1.1 release
- bumps up PORTEPOCH because of weird versioning
- add LICENSE
- add dependency on tkabber-1.1
- add pkg-message to describe how to use plugins

files/ dir and pkg-message.in no longer needed
(please sv rm files and dir)

Note to the commiter: not to commit before ports/188256 is closed (since plugins depends on proper net-im/tkabber version; both ports have same maintainer)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
